coordinate_policy.antipodal_tie_break_note: For even-N rings, the antipodal node is assigned negative signed distance, so a uniform 24-node ring centered at 0 has unwrapped centroid -0.5. This is a deterministic convention and must be compared against the symmetric baseline.
coordinate_policy.coordinate_mapping: coord[0] is ring index i; theta_i = 2*pi*i/N; clockwise direction is increasing unwrapped ring index modulo N
